titles.title: I Know the Lord Will Make Away for Me (I Know the Lord Will Answer All My Prayer)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know the Lord will make away for Me I know the Lord will make away for Me If I live a holy life, shown the wrong and do the right I know the Lord will make away for Me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know the Lord will answer all my prayers I know the Lord will answer all my prayers If live a holy life, shown the wrong and do the right I know the Lord will answer all my prayers
